Resolution: No action needed. Client installation completed successfully.
Possible WMI corruption. Rebuild WMI repository and retry ccmsetup.

Message: Installation failed - insufficient memory or resources
Resolution: Check available disk space and memory on the target device.

Message: The previous client version is being upgraded
Resolution: An upgrade is in progress. Wait for completion.
Prerequisites not met. Check .NET Framework version and Windows version requirements.

Message: Software Restriction Policy blocked the installation
Resolution: Check Software Restriction Policies or AppLocker. The ccmsetup.exe may be blocked.
The installation was cancelled. If silent, check for interactive prompts.
Check ccmsetup.log for the specific MSI failure. Common causes: WMI corruption, insufficient permissions, locked files.

Message: Another MSI installation is already in progress
Resolution: Wait for the other installation to finish, then retry.
The client.msi is not compatible with this OS architecture. Verify x86 vs x64.

Message: Another version of the MECM client is already installed
Resolution: Uninstall the existing client first, then retry installation.
WMI namespace or class not found. May indicate WMI corruption. Try 'winmgmt /resetrepository'.
The account lacks WMI permissions. Check WMI namespace security.

Message: WBEM_E_OUT_OF_MEMORY - WMI is out of memory
Resolution: WMI service is resource-starved. Restart the WMI service and check for WMI provider leaks.

Message: WBEM_E_INVALID_NAMESPACE - The specified namespace does not exist
Resolution: WMI namespace is missing. Rebuild WMI repository or repair the CCM client.

Message: WBEM_E_INVALID_CLASS - The specified class does not exist
Resolution: WMI class missing. Recompile MOF files or repair the CCM client installation.
A WMI provider crashed. Restart the WMI service and check the CCM client health.

Message: WBEM_E_PROVIDER_NOT_FOUND - The requested WMI provider was not found
Resolution: CCM WMI provider is not registered. Repair or reinstall the CCM client.
